title: Qlik Sense Data Connection
description: A data connection defines how Qlik Sense connects to an external data source for loading data into applications. Connections specify the provider type, connection string, authentication credentials, and the architecture of the connector.

id.description: Unique identifier (GUID) assigned by the repository

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the data connection was created

modifiedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the data connection was last modified

modifiedByUserName.description: Username of the user who last modified the connection

name.description: Display name of the data connection

connectionstring.description: Connection string containing provider-specific parameters for connecting to the data source

type.description: Connection provider type identifier (e.g., QvOdbcConnectorPackage.exe, QvOleDbConnectorPackage.exe, folder, web)

engineObjectId.description: Engine object identifier associated with the connection

username.description: Username for authenticating to the data source

password.description: Password for authenticating to the data source (write-only)

owner.description: The user who owns the data connection

tags.description: Tags applied to the data connection

customProperties.description: Custom property values assigned to the data connection

privileges.description: List of privileges the current user has on this connection

schemaPath.description: Schema path identifying the entity type in the QRS
